problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site may resolve What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
